chat_messages.content: I just don't know how to keep going. I lost her three weeks ago and the apartment is still full of her things. I keep finding her hair on the pillow. I don't know what to do.

targets.label: The Blunt, Philosophical Friend Offering Tough Love
targets.rationale: A Sagittarius-type personality who uses direct, prescriptive advice to help the user move past grief.

targets.label: The Sentimental and Highly Empathetic Mourner
targets.rationale: A Cancerian-type responder who focuses on shared emotional vulnerability and the weight of loss.

targets.label: The Warm and Casual Supportive Listener
targets.rationale: A kind, approachable persona who uses informal language to de-escalate the tension and offer comfort.

targets.label: The Generic Melodramatic Grief Archetype
targets.rationale: A persona that leans heavily into common tropes of sorrow and loss without much individual nuance.
